content:
This is a resource from the Mythag University server containing a general indication on what Wheels and Covenants to use for all characters, created with the help of the community; It includes, amidst other things, a list of ALL the Wheels (SSR and SR), Covenants and Posses (and how to get them) too, and will be updated in time to include links to other useful guides and be expanded with new content.
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509

If you have any Suggestion, Feedback or Error to report, feel free to contact me <:Corpo_advance:1459080545882341376>
